Details on an Elastic Inference accelerator. For more information, see [Working with Amazon Elastic Inference on Amazon ECS](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonECS/latest/developerguide/ecs-eia.html) in the *Amazon Elastic Container Service Developer Guide*.

ecs.taskdefinition.inferenceaccelerator..Description: The Elastic Inference accelerator device name. The `deviceName` must also be referenced in a container definition as a [ResourceRequirement](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-ecs-taskdefinition-resourcerequirement.html).
The Elastic Inference accelerator type to use.
